failedAssertions.reason: Sortino ratio is not displayed in the Performance Summary section. The UI shows 6 metric cards: Total Return, CAGR, Sharpe Ratio, Max Drawdown, Win Rate, Trade Count. CAGR occupies the slot where Sortino should be. The validation contract requires Sharpe, Sortino, Max Drawdown, and Win Rate.

End-to-end backtest flow partially fails because Sortino ratio is missing from metrics. All other aspects pass: NAV chart with CSI 300 and ChiNext benchmarks, trade list table with 4 trades, no errors.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated validation surface from FreqUI to Streamlit. Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: agent-browser (Streamlit)' section with Streamlit-specific layout, interaction quirks, and backtest flow instructions.
